summary: Iteration 55 - Two Features Tested: 1) Commission Display Fix - Commission column visible in Daily Projection table, commission assigned to trade entries. 2) Content Protection - Security tab in Admin Settings with all toggles working (copy/right-click/keyboard shortcut prevention, watermark overlay). All backend tests passed (12/12). Frontend UI verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Commission feature properly implemented - total_commission from onboarding wizard is assigned to last trade entry using MongoDB $inc operator (server.py lines 5214-5224)
Content Protection feature properly implemented - Security tab in Admin Settings with all toggles (content_protection_enabled, watermark, disable_copy, disable_rightclick, disable_shortcuts)
ContentProtection component correctly renders watermark overlay and blocks copy/right-click/keyboard shortcuts when enabled
DashboardLayout correctly imports and renders ContentProtection component with settings from platformSettings
PlatformSettings model includes all content_protection fields with correct defaults (lines 314-319)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two features verified: 1) Commission Display Fix - Commission column visible in Daily Projection table (Profit Tracker > Monthly Table > History > Daily View). Commission values appear for trades with commission assigned. The total_commission from onboarding wizard is assigned to the last trade entry. 2) Content Protection - Security tab in Admin Settings with toggles for: Enable Content Protection (master toggle), Show User Watermark, Disable Text Selection & Copy, Disable Right-Click Menu, Block Keyboard Shortcuts. When enabled, ContentProtection component renders watermark overlay and blocks copy/right-click/shortcuts.
